title: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro
summary: Google DeepMind introduced Lyria 3 Pro, an advanced music generation model that enables creation of tracks up to 3 minutes long with customization and creative control. The model is being integrated into more Google products and represents an enhancement over the earlier Lyria 3.
